object_name: Medical utility cart with drawers and monitor arm

movable_parts.name: sm_wheel_a03_frontright_01
movable_parts.motion: 360-degree swivel of the caster wheel assembly around the vertical axis.

movable_parts.name: sm_wheel_a03_frontright_base_01
movable_parts.motion: Rolling of the wheel around its horizontal axle.

movable_parts.name: sm_wheel_a03_frontleft_01
movable_parts.motion: 360-degree swivel of the caster wheel assembly around the vertical axis.

movable_parts.name: sm_wheel_a03_frontleft_base_01
movable_parts.motion: Rolling of the wheel around its horizontal axle.

movable_parts.motion: 360-degree swivel of the caster wheel assembly around the vertical axis.

movable_parts.name: sm_wheel_a03_backright_base_01
movable_parts.motion: Rolling of the wheel around its horizontal axle.

movable_parts.name: sm_wheel_a03_backleft_01
movable_parts.motion: 360-degree swivel of the caster wheel assembly around the vertical axis.

movable_parts.name: sm_wheel_a03_backleft_base_01
movable_parts.motion: Rolling of the wheel around its horizontal axle.

movable_parts.name: sm_drawer1_a03_01
movable_parts.motion: Slides in and out along the cart's depth axis.

movable_parts.name: sm_drawer2_a03_01
movable_parts.motion: Slides in and out along the cart's depth axis.

movable_parts.name: sm_drawer3_a03_01
movable_parts.motion: Slides in and out along the cart's depth axis.

movable_parts.name: sm_drawer4_a03_01
movable_parts.motion: Slides in and out along the cart's depth axis.

movable_parts.name: sm_drawer5_a03_01
movable_parts.motion: Slides in and out along the cart's depth axis.

movable_parts.name: sm_drawer1_a03_lockrotor_01
movable_parts.motion: Rotates to lock/unlock the drawer.

movable_parts.name: sm_trashcan1_a03_biglid_01
movable_parts.motion: Hinges open upwards.

movable_parts.name: sm_trashcan1_a03_smalllid_01
movable_parts.motion: Hinges open upwards, operated by the foot lever.

movable_parts.name: sm_trashcan1_a03_lever_01
movable_parts.motion: Pivots downwards when pressed to open the small lid.

movable_parts.name: sm_trashcan2_a03_biglid_01
movable_parts.motion: Hinges open upwards.

movable_parts.name: sm_trashcan2_a03_smalllid_01
movable_parts.motion: Hinges open upwards, operated by the foot lever.

movable_parts.name: sm_trashcan2_a03_lever_01
movable_parts.motion: Pivots downwards when pressed to open the small lid.

movable_parts.name: sm_arm_a03_01
movable_parts.motion: Swivels horizontally at its base.

movable_parts.name: sm_arm_a03_screencase_01
movable_parts.motion: Tilts up and down.
movable_parts.range_description: Tilts up/down by about 20 degrees from center.

special_notes: The cart is mobile via four caster wheels, each with independent swivel and roll joints. The trash can lever's motion should be coupled to the small lid's opening. The monitor arm has multiple articulation points. The cart is pushed via the handle `sm_base_a03_handle_01`. Several loose items (cups, lids, bottle) are on the cart and are separate, graspable objects, not articulated parts of the cart itself.
